description_long: This street light features a tall, slender black pole with a circular base for stability. About two-thirds up the pole, a yellow control box or label is attached, adding a functional and visual accent. The lamp head is mounted on a single horizontal arm that extends perpendicularly from the pole, with a sleek, modern, and elongated cylindrical design. The lamp head appears to be made of metal and possibly glass or plastic for the light diffuser, with no visible decorative elements. The overall design is utilitarian and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parking lots, or streets. The materials and construction suggest durability and resistance to outdoor conditions.
description: A modern street light with a slim black pole, a yellow control box, and a single horizontal arm supporting a sleek, cylindrical lamp head.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pole, circular base, and the lamp head facing forward with the yellow control box visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the horizontal arm and the elongated lamp head extending to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the lamp head and the pole, with the control box partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the horizontal arm and lamp head extending to the left, with the control box on the pole.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, elongated cylindrical lamp head with a smooth metallic finish and a possible translucent diffuser, lacking decorative elements.
